name: Zhiyong He(何智勇)
about: I am a PhD student at University of Utah in Computer Graphics since Fall 2025, advised by professor Yin Yang.
I work on physics-based animation and neural physics. I am also interested in robotics and computational mechanics.
Before my PhD studies, I received my bachelor's degree from Department of Mechanics at Zhejiang University.

publications.title: M-ABD: Scalable, Efficient, and Robust Multi-Affine-Body Dynamics.
publications.authors: Zhiyong He, Dewen Guo, Minghao Guo, Yili Zhao, Wojciech Matusik, Hao Su, Chenfanfu Jiang, Peter Yichen Chen, Yin Yang

publications.title: JGS2-GQ: Training-free 2nd Jacobi with Gaussian Quadrature.
publications.authors: Dewen Guo, Zixuan Lu, Zhiyong He, Yuqi Meng, Bohan Wang, Lei Lan, Weiwei Xu, Chenfanfu Jiang, Yin Yang
